title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses infrastructure scaling at Shopify, the cyclical emergence of new database companies every 15 years, and challenges in AI coding agents. Topics include P99 engineering hiring in the AI era and the future trajectory of database technology.
